{{CargoRelic
|name=Leo
|class_id=21935
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Love pure as gold, enduring the real test,
Death cannot part us, in love we are blessed.
|fame=110
|art=73
|fth=66
|civ=53
|tech=60
|ss1=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss2=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss3=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss4=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss5=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss6=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%
|ss7=Novice Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT Rate +5%<br>Snail All ELMT CRIT DMG +5%<br>Expert Scrolls collected from Drill Rig +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, B-tads gained +15%
|skill2=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Travel SPD +9%
|skill3=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Cells collected +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Leo Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Dumas|3rec=4.62M|3atk=54279|3defense=35657|3hp=835873|3weak=?
|4name=Carl Jung|4rec=8.72M|4atk=76914|4defense=50526|4hp=1507012|4weak=?
|5name=Armstrong|5rec=15.47M|5atk=104464|5defense=68624|5hp=2603608|5weak=?
|6name=Napoleon|6rec=32.75M|6atk=136962|6defense=89972|6hp=4154639|6weak=?
|Arec=50.60M|Aatk=175193|Adefense=115087|Ahp=6541943|Aweak=?
}}}}
